The '''Essesia system''', also known as '''Esseles system''', was an eight-planet system that was the location of the [[Ringali Shell]] world of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. The system was within the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]].

{{System-stub}}
